text:
OREGON
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, c. 421, 36 Stat. 847, the Executive order of December 12, 1917, creating Power Site Reserve No. 659, is hereby revoked as to the following-described lands:
WILLAMETTE MERIDIAN
